loading-spring.prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: square game loading-screen master for the spring season in the existing Sunrise Farm web game
Input images: Image 1 is the existing game screen and visual-language reference; Image 2 is the existing terrain pixel-art reference; Image 3 is the authoritative shared 66-colour palette reference
Primary request: a serene spring dawn at the same small farm, with the familiar red-roof farmhouse as the single central focal subject, tilled plots, pale blossom trees, fresh pea-green shoots, and a narrow blue stream
Style/medium: polished 16-bit pixel-art environment illustration, visibly stepped pixel clusters, multi-step value ramps, hue-shifted blue-violet shadows, selective sparse dithering only in sky and distant foliage, crisp one-pixel-equivalent dark silhouette outlines, no smooth vector gradients
Composition/framing: 1:1 square master, farmhouse and sunlit doorway entirely inside the central 40 percent of the canvas; keep all essential focal content inside x=35%-65% and y=32%-68%; decorative crops and trees may extend outward; must remain recognizable when center-cropped to landscape, portrait, and ultrawide mobile viewports
Lighting/mood: warm golden dawn breaking through cool spring mist, calm and welcoming
Color palette: strictly harmonize to Image 3; spring emphasis on foliage, sky, neutral, earth and gold ramps; coherent with Images 1 and 2
Materials/textures: chunky grass clusters, tilled soil bands, wooden fence pixels, subtle water highlights
Constraints: no characters, no animals, no UI, no text, no logos, no watermark; do not add new gameplay objects or crops; no photorealism; no isolated floating elements; strong central focal hierarchy with quiet edges

activity-panel.prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: wide reusable seasonal activity-panel background master for the existing Sunrise Farm web game
Input images: Image 1 is the existing game-screen visual-language reference; Image 2 is the formal 32px UI icon pixel-art reference; Image 3 is the authoritative shared 66-colour palette reference
Primary request: an elegant horizontal cream parchment and warm wood activity notice panel, with tiny four-season farm motifs confined to the outer border: spring blossom, summer sunflower, autumn leaf, and winter frost sprig; the central text zone must remain quiet, pale, even, and uncluttered
Style/medium: polished 16-bit pixel-art UI background, multi-step value ramps, hue-shifted violet-brown shadows, selective sparse dithering only along wood and parchment edges, crisp one-pixel-equivalent silhouette outline and corner clusters, no smooth vector gradients
Composition/framing: horizontal 2:1 panel centered inside a square master with generous padding; the inner x=12%-72%, y=24%-76% region must be a low-detail pale parchment text area; place decorative motifs only within the outer 10% border and especially at corners; reserve the right 20% for a readable action button without decoration
Lighting/mood: warm dawn-lit handcrafted farm noticeboard, calm and trustworthy
Color palette: strictly harmonize to Image 3, especially neutral, earth, gold, foliage, violet-shadow and outline ramps; coherent with Images 1 and 2
Materials/textures: restrained wood grain pixels, stitched parchment edge, tiny botanical pixel clusters
Constraints: no text, no letters, no numerals, no button, no characters, no animals, no logos, no watermark; no gameplay content; central region must stay nearly uniform and high-key for dark UI text; high contrast only on the outer border
